taskTemplates:
  - name: "[Dev]"
    description: "Backend/Full-Stack development"

  - name: "[Front]"

    keywords: ["ui", "component", "css", "frontend"]

statePermissions:
  Task:
    allowed: ["To Do -> In Progress", "In Progress -> Done"]
    blocked: ["Done -> Closed"]
    blockedMessage: "Only PM/Lead can close Tasks."
  Bug:
    allowed: ["Approved -> In Progress", "In Progress -> Resolved", "Return -> In Progress", "Committed -> In Progress"]
    blocked: ["New -> Approved", "Resolved -> Done", "Resolved -> Return", "Done -> Closed"]
    blockedMessage: "QA approves/verifies Bugs. PM closes."
  ProductBacklogItem:
    allowed: ["Committed -> In Progress", "In Progress -> Ready For QC", "Return -> In Progress"]
    blocked: ["New -> Approved", "Approved -> Committed", "Ready For QC -> Done", "Ready For QC -> Return"]
    blockedMessage: "PM approves PBIs. QA verifies Ready For QC -> Done."
  Enhancement:
    allowed: ["New -> Committed", "Committed -> Done", "Return -> Committed"]
    blocked: ["Done -> Closed", "Committed -> Return"]
    blockedMessage: "QA can return Enhancements. PM closes."

projects:

  - name: "KhairGate"
